description:
Second subticket of fz-ul4.10. Depends on .10.1 (reification API).

Add lexer + parser support so:
- `quote do: <expr>` and `quote do ... end` parse as Expr::Quote(Box<Expr>).
- `unquote(e)` inside a quote parses as Expr::Unquote(Box<Expr>).
- Outside a quote, unquote is a parse error.

Eval semantics (interp): Expr::Quote(e) walks e and calls expr_to_value, with one twist — wherever it sees Expr::Unquote(u), it evaluates u in the surrounding env and splices the resulting Value in place of the reified node. So `x = 5; quote do: 1 + unquote(x)` evaluates to the reified form of `1 + 5`.

Tests: a few quote/unquote programs run through the REPL/interp and produce the expected reified-AST values.
title: quote / unquote syntax
